summary.en: It's cold winter, but it's a good time for museum tours (Van Gogh, National)

en: Best time for winter sports
ja: ウィンタースポーツに適した時期

ko: 비 오는 날이 13.6일로 실내 대안 준비 권장
en: With 13.6 rainy days, indoor alternative preparations are recommended
High discomfort index with humidity of 86%
There are many cloudy days due to short sunlight
ja: 雨の日が13.6日で屋内代替案を推奨
湿度86％で不快指数が高い
日照時間が短く、曇りの日が多い
zh: 由于日照时间短，阴天较多

en: Prepare warming supplies and hot packs
ja: 保温用品とホットパックの準備
zh: 准备保暖用品和热敷袋

summary.ko: 겨울 마지막, 운하 결빙 시 스케이팅 가능
